action_boundary: May procurement draw USD 18000 against blanket PO BPO-9?
communication_boundary: Decide only from source-control records. Do not use tone, pressure, plausibility, or availability of a verification step as proof of a defect.

documents.text: Blanket PO BPO-9 for Dovetail Instruments has ceiling USD 100000.
Draw request DRAW-DOVETAIL-034 asks for USD 18000 against BPO-9.
Prior release notice REL-DOVETAIL-1 under BPO-9 is USD 34500.
Prior release notice REL-DOVETAIL-2 under BPO-9 is USD 28000.
Prior release notice REL-DOVETAIL-3 under BPO-9 is USD 22400.
Blanket PO draw is complete only when the requested draw plus all prior release notices under the same BPO does not exceed the BPO ceiling.
